title: Friday Sermon 26 April 1985
description:
A Review of the Pakistani Government's 'White Paper' Qadiyaniyyat— A Grave Threat to Islam: The Supreme Plan for the Universal Regeneration of Islam Maligned as a 'Conspiracy Against Islam — A Campaign Grossly Hostile to the Islamic Faith'.

In 1984 the Islamic government of Pakistan set aside all Islamic injunctions and took upon itself the burden of depriving the Ahmadi Muslims of many basic human rights including religious and social freedoms. In an attempt to justify this action, the government of Pakistan published a so-called White Paper under the title 'Qadiyaniyyat - Islam kay liya Sangin Khatrah' ['Qadiyaniyyat - A Grave Threat to Islam'].

Although there was nothing new in this so-called White Paper and the Community literature already included detailed answers to all the issues which were raised, nevertheless Hazrat Mirza Tahir Ahmad - Khalifatul Masih IV, the then Imam of the Ahmadiyya Muslim Community, answered these allegations in a series of Friday Sermons.

This Friday Sermon deals with the grand plan for the victory of Islam launched by the Ahmadiyya Muslim Community and how the so-called Muslim divines of this age, in criticising it, have ignored the teachings of 'The Holy Quran'.

The text http://www.alislam.org/urdu/sermon/FST19850426-UR.pdf
English translation http://store.alislam.org/suplforunreo.html
